createAccount.title: Create Your Restaurant Account
createAccount.description: Set up your digital storefront in minutes. Upload your menu, define pricing, add food images, and start receiving orders instantly through our fully automated onboarding flow.

realTimeOrders.title: Manage Orders in Real-Time
realTimeOrders.description: Track new orders, accepted orders, rider assignments, and delivery progress — all updated live. Everything stays synchronized across devices.

support.title: 24/7 Support for Restaurants
support.description: Get priority assistance at any time. From technical help to menu optimization, our support team ensures your operations run smoothly.

sectionSix.description: Our platform empowers restaurants to operate smarter, serve faster, and scale effortlessly. Designed with advanced automation and real-time insights, we help food businesses stay ahead in a competitive delivery market.

allOrderTypes.question: Can I use the platform for both dine-in and delivery orders?
allOrderTypes.answer: Yes, our system supports all order types — delivery, takeaway, and dine-in. Restaurants can easily manage them through a single dashboard designed for speed and efficiency.

updateMenu.question: How do I update my restaurant menu?
updateMenu.answer: You can update your menu directly from the restaurant dashboard. Add or remove items, update prices, manage variations, and control availability in real time without any technical assistance.

deliveryRiders.question: Do you provide delivery riders?
deliveryRiders.answer: We support both in-house and third-party delivery models. Restaurants can use their own riders or integrate with supported delivery partners depending on their business needs.

joiningFees.question: Are there any fees for joining the platform?
joiningFees.answer: There are no upfront setup fees. Pricing depends on your selected plan and order volume. Full details are available during onboarding or by contacting our sales team.

multipleDevices.question: Can I manage orders from multiple devices?
multipleDevices.answer: Yes. Your account stays synchronized across all devices, allowing you to manage orders, menus, and analytics from multiple tablets, phones, or desktops simultaneously.
